page: Amazon Web Services r8idn.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring Intel x86_64 processors. It is configured with 8 virtual CPUs mapped to 4 physical cores, utilizing 2 threads per core with dedicated CPU allocation. The processor operates at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. This instance runs on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, which minimizes virtualization overhead to deliver consistent performance.

The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. For local storage, the r8idn.2xlarge includes a bundled 474 GB NVMe SSD instance store volume. This local storage configuration provides high-speed, low-latency data access directly attached to the host, though it is ephemeral by nature.

Networking capabilities include a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps, and the instance is optimized for both network throughput and Elastic Block Store connectivity. It does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Given the high memory density, dedicated Intel compute cores, and fast local NVMe storage, this instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads, database hosting, caching layers, and real-time data processing applications.
description: Amazon Web Services r8idn.2xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized instance powered by Intel processors running on the AWS Nitro hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs across 4 physical cores with a clock speed of 3.9 GHz, paired with 64.0 GB of system memory. This configuration establishes a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU, suitable for memory-intensive applications. For high-speed local data access, the instance includes a bundled 474 GB NVMe SSD instance store volume. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 12 Gbps, with optimization for both network and EBS traffic. The r8idn.2xlarge is designed for workloads requiring significant memory capacity and fast local storage, such as relational databases, in-memory caches, and data analytics.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8idn.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 8 Intel vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, a 474 GB NVMe SSD instance store, and 12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on the Nitro hypervisor.
